basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Post Doctoral Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
basic_details.short_information: IISER Pune is recruiting 02 positions (JRF + Post-Doctoral Fellow) in the Department of Chemistry on temporary & contractual basis.

age_limit.age_details: Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF) & Private Agency

post_wise_qualification.post_name: Ph.D. in Chemistry or related areas (Thesis submitted candidates may apply)
Organic/Medicinal Chemistry, diazo compounds, visible light/metal catalysis
Woman candidate + Family income ≤ ₹15 lakh per annum

qualification.details: JRF: ₹37,000/- + 30% HRA | Upto 13.02.2027 Post-Doctoral Fellow: ₹72,000/- (₹53,340/- for SRF/thesis submitted) | Upto 31.03.2027 (extendable)

vacancy_details.details: 1. Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Project: “Lightening Arylidene Diazosuccinimides: Photoinduced Generation of Carbenes and Radicals to access Pyromellitic Diimide (PMDI) based Luminophors and Bioactive Organic Compounds” Project Code: 31823693 No. of Posts: 01 2. Post-Doctoral Fellow (Specifically for Woman Ph.D. Scholar) Project: “Photoinduced Generation of Carbenes and Radicals to Access Potential Bioactive Organic Compounds” No. of Posts: 01

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send the duly filled prescribed application format (available on institute website under the advertisement) in PDF format to [email protected] on or before 23.07.2026.
Subject Line: “Name of the Post and Advt. No.52/2026”
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only.
List of shortlisted candidates will be uploaded on the institute website.
Documents to be produced at the time of Interview:
important_instructions: This is purely temporary contractual engagement with no claim for permanent absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Keep checking the official IISER Pune website for updates.

rows.jrf_details: M.Sc. in General/Organic Chemistry (min 60%) + valid National Level Test
rows.post_doctoral_fellow_details: Ph.D. in Chemistry or related areas (Thesis submitted candidates may apply)
Organic/Medicinal Chemistry, diazo compounds, visible light/metal catalysis
Woman candidate + Family income ≤ ₹15 lakh per annum

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Subject Line: “Name of the Post and Advt. No.52/2026” Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only. List of shortlisted candidates will be uploaded on the institute website. Documents to be produced at the time of Interview: All educational certificates & mark sheets Proof of age, experience, publications Passport size photograph Valid ID proof

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: This is purely temporary contractual engagement with no claim for permanent absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Keep checking the official IISER Pune website for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 Advt 52/2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email is 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are vacant in IISER Pune Chemistry Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 02 posts – 1 Junior Research Fellow and 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow (reserved for Woman Ph.D. Scholar).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary of Junior Research Fellow at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- per month plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Women candidates holding Ph.D. in Chemistry with family annual income not exceeding ₹15 lakh.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET/GATE mandatory for IISER Pune JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have a valid CSIR/UGC/DBT-JRF or equivalent national level fellowship scorecard.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for IISER Pune JRF and PDF Recruitment?
faq.answer: Send the prescribed application form in PDF to [email protected] mentioning the post and advertisement number in the subject.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is preferred for IISER Pune Chemistry projects?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in organic synthesis, diazo compounds, visible light catalysis, and metal catalysis is highly preferred.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of appointment in IISER Pune Recruitment?
faq.answer: JRF upto 13.02.2027 and Post-Doctoral Fellow upto 31.03.2027 (extendable based on performance).

faq.question: Q10. Will candidates get any travel allowance for IISER Pune interview?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA is admissible for appearing in the selection process.
